item.title: VueJs 初学者第 2 部分 - 方法 | VueJs Beginners part 2 - Methods
item.description:
要将方法添加到组件实例，我们使用methods选项。
我们可以像定义data一样定义它们，实际上methods是函数的对象。

 const app = Vue . createApp ({ data () { return { count : 0 } }, methods : { increment () { this . count ++ } }, )}

事件和关键修饰符：

在事件处理程序中调用诸如 event.preventDefault() 之类的东西是非常常见的。 它可以在方法本身中完成，但有一些修饰符可以更容易地应用它们。

例子：

 @click.right @click.prevent.stop @keyup.13 <!-- the submit event will no longer reload the page --> <form @ submit.prevent= "onSubmit" ></form> <!-- only call `submit` when the `key` is `Enter` --> <input @ keyup.enter= "submit" />

你想要更多检查这里

在这里自己运行和编辑它们

嘿，如果你是第一次登陆这里，你应该知道这个网站是一个全球社区，他们通过博客讲述他们的经历，以帮助像你这样的人。

如果您好奇，请立即注册。 免费！

一旦暂停，hshoja 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，hshoja 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，hshoja 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 hshoja 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 hshoja 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 hshoja 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

1 VueJs Beginners part 1 - Directives 2 VueJs Beginners part 2 - Methods

To add methods to a component instance we use the methods option.
we can define them the way we defined data and indeed methods is a object of functions.

const app = Vue.createApp({ data() { return { count: 0 } }, methods: { increment() { this.count++ } },
)}

Event and key Modifiers:

It is a very common need to call something like event.preventDefault() inside event handlers. it can be done in method itself but there are some modifiers to apply them easier.

examples:

@click.right
@click.prevent.stop
@keyup.13 <!-- the submit event will no longer reload the page -->
<form @submit.prevent="onSubmit"></form> <!-- only call `submit` when the `key` is `Enter` -->
<input @keyup.enter="submit" />

do you want more check here

Run and edit them yourself here

1 VueJs Beginners part 1 - Directives 2 VueJs Beginners part 2 - Methods

Hey, if you're landing here for the first time, you should know that this website is a global community of folks who blog about their experiences to help folks like you out.

Sign up now if you're curious. It's free!

shrey vijayvargiya - Oct 22

Once suspended, hshoja will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, hshoja will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by hshoja will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If hshoja is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: OSD600 实验室10 | OSD600 Lab10
item.description:
达多莱

发表于您选择了哪个发布工具和软件包注册表？ 提供您提到的所有内容的链接。

我决定使用npm创建我的作用域包

创建版本的过程是什么？ 详细说明，以便其他开发人员可以阅读您的博客并了解如何做同样的事情。

  • 必须注册到 npmjs
  • 在控制台上必须通过npm login命令登录
  • 确保一切准备就绪
  • 做一个npm publish --access public

你在发布时学到了什么？ 你有没有“啊哈！” 时刻或卡住？

我了解到npx在沙箱中运行命令，因此某些命令不起作用

您需要对代码、文件、构建等进行多少更改才能使用所选的包格式和注册表？

由于沙箱，我不得不摆脱process.exit()调用。 出于这个原因，我不得不做一个小的重构。 我还将主要可执行文件移动到bin下符合最佳实践

与您的合作伙伴进行的用户测试会议进行得如何？ 描述它是什么样的，他们在哪里卡住了，以及你是如何纠正这些问题的。

无需克隆、下载或安装，它适用于远程代码。 由于她是一位有成就的开发人员，并且有使用create-react-app的 npx 版本等工具的经验，所以没有任何问题，它在第一次尝试时就成功了。

项目发布后，用户如何安装和使用你的项目？ 提供链接和一些说明。

  • 无需克隆、下载或安装
  • 在您的机器上安装节点 18 或更高版本
  • 执行npx @dadolhay/ssg -h寻求帮助
  • 示例运行： npx @dadolhay/ssg -i ./inputs -o ./out

一旦暂停，达多利将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，dadolhay 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，dadolhay 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 dadolhay 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记达多尔海的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 dadolhay 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

dadolhay

Posted on Oct 29

Which release tool and package registry did you choose? Provide links to everything you mention.

I decided to use npm to create my scoped package

What was the process for creating a release? Be detailed so that other developers could read your blog and get some idea how to do the same.

  • Had to register to npmjs
  • On the console had to log in via the npm login command
  • make sure everything is ready
  • do an npm publish --access public

What did you learn while doing your release? Did you have any "aha!" moments or get stuck?

I learned that npx runs commands in a sandbox and for this reason some commands do not work

How much did you have to alter your code, files, build, etc. to use the chosen package format and registry?

Because of the sandbox I had to get rid of process.exit() calls. For this reason, I had to do a minor refactor. I also moved the main executable to under bin conform to best practices

How did the User Testing session with your partner go? Describe what it was like, where they got stuck, and how you corrected the problems.

No need to clone, download or install, it works with remote code. Since she is an accomplished developer, and has experience with tools like create-react-app's npx version, there were no issues, it worked on the first try.

How do users install and use your project now that it has been released? Provide links and some instructions.

  • No need to clone, download or install
  • Have node 18 or later on your machine
  • execute npx @dadolhay/ssg -h for help
  • example run: npx @dadolhay/ssg -i ./inputs -o ./out

and npx will download, install and execute the code for you.

Sidharth 'R3FluX' Sreejil - Oct 29

Once suspended, dadolhay will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, dadolhay will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by dadolhay will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If dadolhay is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 我的第三次 Hacktoberfest PR | My third Hacktoberfest PR
item.description:
大家好，

对于我的第三次 Hacktoberfest PR，我在这个repo上工作。 问题是改进包含发现共享技能的开发人员数量的框的 UI。 设计不是我的强项，但我还是决定尝试改进设计。 首先，我从网上获得了一些设计灵感。 我决定使用渐变配色方案使框弹出并找到一个不错的文本字体和颜色来与背景形成对比。 我确保该设计在明暗模式下看起来都很好，因为网站同时支持这两种模式。 这是我的拉取请求。

前：

后：

一旦暂停，neilan99 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，neilan99 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，neilan99 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 neilan99 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 neilan99 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Hi everyone,

For my third Hacktoberfest PR, I worked on this repo. Devmate is a project for developers to find other developers who share the same skills to become friends.

The issue was to improve the UI of a box containing the number of developers found that share a skill. Design is not my strong suit, but I decided to try to improve the design anyway. To start, I took some inspiration online for some designs. I decided to use a gradient colour scheme to make the box pop out and found a nice text font and colour to contrast against the background. I made sure that the design looked good for both the light and dark mode since the website supported both. Here is my pull request.

Before:

After:

item.title: Integrar Dev.to API + NextJS + Typescript + TailwindCSS | Integrar Dev.to API + NextJS + Typescript + TailwindCSS
item.description:
利斯托！！！ 耶耶！！！ Con así ya tenés toda la información disponible de tu post al momento de renderizar, el resto ya es a tu imaginación, al forma como quieras que luzca la página de blog y qué tanta info, en mi caso quise hacerlo lo más sencillo posible, pero seguro vos podrás ponerlo mucho más bonito, lo importante acá era mostrarte el proceso de cómo se hace la integración de NextJS con el API de Dev.to Con así ya Tenés toda la Informationación disponible de tu post al momento de renderizar, el resto ya es a tu imaginación, al forma como quieras que luzca la página de blog y qué tanta info, en mi caso quise hacerlo lo más sencillo posible, pero seguro vos podrás ponerlo mucho más bonito, lo importante acá era mostrarte el proceso de cómo se hace la integración de NextJS con el API de Dev.to

Eso es todo! Eso es todo！ Espero te pueda servir, dale like y me podés seguir en twitter como @viistorrr Espero te pueda servir, dale like y me podés seguir en twitter como @viistorrr

@viistorrr @viistorrr

viistorrr.com vistorrr.com



原文:

[Dev.to + NextJS + Typescript + TailwindCSS]

En la actualización de mi website, estaba buscando cómo y dónde publicar mi blog, soy Frontend y no quería usar solamente wordpress porque - entre otras cosas no me gusta😆 - y tratando de solucionar qué hacer, encontré Dev.to que además me ofrece una API bastante sencilla de utilizar, para hacer ésta integración encontré un post e intenté seguirlo pero me pareció algo confuso, por eso acá les voy a mostrar lo más sencillo que pueda la forma como hice la implementación para que tu también logres hacerlo si quieres publicar tus post de Dev.to en tu sitio web personal o para que se lo ofrezcas a algún cliente, simplemente en el momento que consideres te pueda servir.

Debo aclarar que estoy asumiendo que ya tienes conocimientos previos de NextJS y Typescript, por eso me voy a saltar la parte de la creación del proyecto, seteado y todas esas cosas, vamos a ir directamente a la parte de la integración del blog

Antes debo aclarar que vamos a usar NextJS con Typescript, por eso la extensión de los archivos que verás son .tsx ahora si, vamos a lo que nos gustar, al código! 👨🏾‍💻

Crea una carpeta blog dentro de pages y agregas el archivo index.tsx

En éste index.tsx vamos a tener la lista de todos tus posts en Dev.to, por eso, al final es a gusto personal la manera como quieras tener la UX, te mostraré lo sencilla de la mía porque no quería tener mucho diseño en ésta parte, pues lo que nos importa es cómo queda el código

Ahora, en pages/blog/index.tsx lo primero es conectarnos al api de Dev.to, ésto lo vamos a hacer con SSR de NextJS usando getServerSideProps es muy sencillo, sólo debes llamar a la URL

https://dev.to/api/articlesusername=${process.env.DEV_USERNAME}

quiere decir que debes tener claro tu nombre de usuario configurado en tu archivo .env

DEV_USERNAME=tunombredeusuario

Luego de ésto, el llamado a Dev.to API debe quedar así👇🏾

export const getServerSideProps = async () => { const devDotToPosts = await fetch( `https://dev.to/api/articles?username=${process.env.DEV_USERNAME}` ); const res = await devDotToPosts.json(); return { props: { devDotToPosts: res, }, };
};

NOTA: Vas a ver un componente ******<Layout> </Layout> pero no es más que un wrapper donde tengo un Header y Footer, no es más que ésto, eso lo podés modificar y hacerlo completamente a tu gusto

<div className="relative pt-6 pb-16 sm:pb-24 font-monserrat"> <Header /> <div className="flex overflow-hidden bg-white py-8 px-4 sm:px-2 lg:px-4 lg:py-6 justify-center"> {children} </div> <Footer /> </div>

Dicho eso, vamos con la portada del blog pages/blog/index.tsx debe verse algo como ésto👇🏾

import Link from "next/link";
import Layout from "@components/Layout";
import { VImage } from "@components/image/VImage"; const Tags = (tags) => { return tags.tags.map((tag) => ( <strong key={tag} className="text-xs text-primary"> #{tag}{" "} </strong> ));
}; const Blog = ({ devDotToPosts }) => { return ( <Layout> <div className="container mx-auto px-4"> <div className="flex flex-wrap -mx-4"> {devDotToPosts && devDotToPosts.map((post) => ( <div className="w-full md:w-1/2 lg:w-1/3 px-4 mb-8" key={post.id}> <Link href={`/blog/posts/${encodeURIComponent(post.slug)}`}> <a> <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg overflow-hidden"> <VImage src={post.social_image} alt={post.title} width={500} height={200} /> <div className="p-4"> <Tags tags={post.tag_list} /> <p className="text-secondary text-sm mt-1"> {post.description} </p> </div> </div> </a> </Link> </div> ))} </div> </div> </Layout> );
}; export const getServerSideProps = async () => { const devDotToPosts = await fetch( `https://dev.to/api/articles?username=${process.env.DEV_USERNAME}` ); const res = await devDotToPosts.json(); return { props: { devDotToPosts: res, }, };
}; export default Blog;

Como ven, tengo un custom componente VImage para cargar las imágenes, acá se los dejo

import Image from "next/image";
import { VImageProps } from "./types"; const vCustomLoader = ({ src, width, quality }) => { return `${src}?w=${width}&q=${quality || 75}`;
}; export const VImage = ({ src, alt, width, height, className }: VImageProps) => { return ( <Image loader={vCustomLoader} src={src} alt={alt} width={width} height={height} className={className} priority /> );
};

y acá las respectivas PropsTypes:

export type VImageProps = { src: string; alt: string; width: number | string; height: number | string; className?: string;
};

Listo!!! Con ésto tenés la portada de tu Blog en tu Website personal, ahora vamos a ver una forma sencilla de pintar cada entrada.

Para ésto debes crear el archivo [slug].tsx dentro de la carpeta blog, así debe quedar pages/blog/posts/[slug].tsx

Una vez aquí, lo primero que se debe hacer es obtener la url del post que nos entrega Dev.to, ésto lo hacemos con getStaticPaths pues así le estamos diciendo a NextJS dónde va a ir a consultar la información del post que quieres mostrar, ésta función debe lucir algo como ésto👇🏾

export async function getStaticPaths() { const devDotToPosts = await fetch( `https://dev.to/api/articles?username=${process.env.DEV_USERNAME}` ); const posts = await devDotToPosts.json(); return { paths: posts.map((post) => { return { params: { slug: post.slug, }, }; }), fallback: false, };
}

Ahora debemos traer las Props que se van a utilizar en la vista, ésto se hace con getStaticProps así:

export const getStaticProps = async ({ params }) => { const devDotToPost = await fetch( `https://dev.to/api/articles/${process.env.DEV_USERNAME}/${params.slug}` ); const res = await devDotToPost.json(); return { props: { devDotToPost: res, }, };
};

Al final pages/blog/posts/[slug].tsx debe quedar algo como ésto

import Head from "next/head";
import Link from "next/link";
import { VImage } from "@components/image/VImage";
import Layout from "@components/Layout"; export default function Post({ devDotToPost }) { const { title, published_at, social_image, body_html, user, type_of, description, canonical_url, } = devDotToPost; return ( <Layout> <Head> <meta property="og:type" content={type_of} /> <meta property="og:title" content={title} /> <meta property="og:description" content={description} /> <meta property="og:image" content={social_image} /> <meta property="og:url" content={canonical_url} /> </Head> <div className="flex justify-center"> <article className="text-lg w-full md:w-3/4 text-justify"> <div className="my-12 border-2 text-secondary bg-white md:rounded-lg overflow-hidden"> <div className="p-4 md:p-32"> <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-primary">{title}</h1> <div className="flex items-center text-secondary rounded-lg py-6"> <VImage className="rounded-full" src={user.profile_image_90} alt={user.name} width={50} height={50} /> <span className="mx-4 font-bold">{user.name}</span> </div> <div className="markdown" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: body_html }} /> </div> </div> <div className="flex justify-center"> <Link href="/blog"> <a className="text-primary inline-flex items-center md:mb-2 lg:mb-0 cursor-pointer text-base pb-8"> <svg className="w-6 h-6 mr-2" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" fill="none" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24" > <path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7" /> </svg> Volver </a> </Link> </div> </article> </div> </Layout> );
} export async function getStaticPaths() { const devDotToPosts = await fetch( `https://dev.to/api/articles?username=${process.env.DEV_USERNAME}` ); const posts = await devDotToPosts.json(); return { paths: posts.map((post) => { return { params: { slug: post.slug, }, }; }), fallback: false, };
} export const getStaticProps = async ({ params }) => { const devDotToPost = await fetch( `https://dev.to/api/articles/${process.env.DEV_USERNAME}/${params.slug}` ); const res = await devDotToPost.json(); return { props: { devDotToPost: res, }, };
};

Y ya!!! Con así ya tenés toda la información disponible de tu post al momento de renderizar, el resto ya es a tu imaginación, al forma como quieras que luzca la página de blog y qué tanta info, en mi caso quise hacerlo lo más sencillo posible, pero seguro vos podrás ponerlo mucho más bonito, lo importante acá era mostrarte el proceso de cómo se hace la integración de NextJS con el API de Dev.to

Eso es todo! Espero te pueda servir, dale like y me podés seguir en twitter como @viistorrr

@viistorrr

viistorrr.com
item.author: viistorrr

item.title: 使用 Route 53 将域流量路由到 AWS | Route domain traffic to AWS with Route 53
item.description:
发表于在 AWS 控制台上，在搜索栏中搜索路由 53。

在 route 53 仪表板上，单击“托管区域”。

在下一个屏幕上单击“创建的托管区域”

如果您还没有在 53 号路线仪表板上进行任何活动，它看起来更像这样

在我们要创建托管区域的屏幕上，填写域名并单击“创建托管区域”。

成功创建托管区域后，一个接一个地复制名称服务器并将它们添加到您的域提供商的 DNS 列表中。

等待几分钟甚至几小时让传播完成，现在我们可以在 AWS 上使用域了。

到下一个...
干杯!

奥卢穆伊瓦·科拉耶米 - 一旦暂停，aws-builder 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，aws-builders 将能够再次评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，aws-builders 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 aws-builders 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 aws-builders：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 aws-builders 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Samuel Olubayo for AWS Community Builders

Posted on Oct 29

On the AWS console, search for route 53 in the search bar.

On the route 53 dashboard, click on "hosted zone".

on the next screen here click on "created hosted zone"

If you haven't done any activities on the route 53 dashboard, it will look more like this

On the screen where we want to create hosted zone, fill in the domain name and click "create hosted zone".

After the hosted zone has been created successfully, copy the nameserver one after the other and add them to your domain provider's DNS list.

wait for a couple of minutes or even hours for propagation to be complete and now we are able to use the domain on AWS.

Onto the next one...
Cheers!

Olumuyiwa Kolayemi - Oct 9

Once suspended, aws-builders will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, aws-builders will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by aws-builders will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If aws-builders is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag aws-builders:

aws-builders consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging aws-builders will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: sambayour

item.title: 啤酒节::end(); | Hacktoberfest::end();
item.description:
阿尔乔姆·塔尼欣

发表于嘿！ 感谢您入住。

经过一个月的搜索和贡献 4 个不同的 repos，我很高兴地说我终于完成了今年的 Hacktoberfest！

这是一次很棒的经历，现在我作为开发人员和贡献者感到更加自信。

我的拉取请求博客文章

我学到的技能和技巧

首先，我在 10 月份取得的成就是我扩展了我的 Git 和 GitHub 技能。 如果我比较一个月前和现在关于 git 的我所知道和可以做的事情，它看起来像是 2 个不同的人。

我学到的另一件有价值的事情是项目通常是如何组织和设置安装的。 通过了解大型存储库如何构建和设计他们的解决方案，我可以改进我未来的项目和工作空间。

当然，并非没有挣扎

如果有人问我明年也想试试 Hacktoberfest，我会犹豫。 做事并为改变世界的项目做出贡献真的很有趣； 但是寻找可能的问题并没有那么有趣。

总的来说，我相信我花了超过 12 个小时来寻找合适的问题和存储库。 也许如果我列出我喜欢的存储库或提出更好的搜索技术，我会再次尝试 Hacktoberfest。 概括

这是一个巨大的挑战，完成它非常轻松！

考特尼·亚托 - 文森特 A. Cicirello - 一旦暂停，devils2ndself 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，devils2ndself 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，devils2ndself 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 devils2ndself 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记devils2ndself 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 devils2ndself 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Artem Tanyhin

Posted on Oct 29

Hey there! Thanks for checking in.

After a month of searching and contributing to 4 different repos, I am glad to say that I am finally done with this year Hacktoberfest!

It has been a great experience, and now I feel much more confident as a developer and a contributor.

My pull request blog posts

Skills and techniques I learned

First and foremost, what I accomplished in October was that I expanded my Git and GitHub skills. If I compare what I knew and could do a month ago and now regarding git, it would seem like 2 different people.

Another valuable thing I learnt is how projects are usually structured and set up for installation. Docker, docker-compose, pnpm, Python requirements & vendors, and much more. By learning how big repos structure and design their solutions, I can improve my future projects and workspace.

Not without struggles, of course

If someone would ask of I'd like to try Hacktoberfest next year too, I would hesitate. Working on things and contributing to world-changing projects is really fun; however searching for possible issues isn't as much fun.

In total, I believe I spent over 12 hours simply searching for fitting issues and repositories. Maybe if I make a list of repositories I like or come up with a better searching technique, I would try Hacktoberfest again. 'Issue-searcher' also seems like a good idea for a project to create!

Summary

Hacktoberfest really gives you a chance and motivation to try new tools or strengthen one's skills. This was a great challenge and it is very relieving to be done with it!

Courtney Yatteau - Oct 12

Vincent A. Cicirello - Oct 12

Once suspended, devils2ndself will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, devils2ndself will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by devils2ndself will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If devils2ndself is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag devils2ndself:

devils2ndself consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging devils2ndself will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: Dart 的 future.asStream() 快速概览 | Dart's future.asStream() quick overview
item.description:
吉尔赫姆·席尔瓦

发表于例如，如果我们取消stream ， future会发生什么？ 如果future抛出exception怎么办？ 进入

问题：在dart中，你不能取消（或停止） future

可能的解决方案：您可以取消stream的订阅。 因此，想法是将future转换为stream ，并在需要时取消它。

我们需要了解会发生什么：

  • 如果它正常完成
    • 在此之前， stream被取消
    • 但该stream已被取消
  • 万一它throws
    • 在stream被取消之前，
      • 并且cancelOnError为false （默认）
      • 并且cancelOnError为true （默认）
    • 情况 1 - future正常完成，在此之前stream被取消
      void main ( List < String > args ) async { try { final stream = longAPICall () . asStream (); var sub = stream . listen ( ( v ) = > print ( ' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v ' ), onDone: () = > print ( ' stream.onDone(): done' ), onError: ( e ) = > print ( ' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()} ' ), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch ( e ) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print ( 'catched: ${e.toString()} ' ); } } Future < bool > longAPICall () async { print ( 'future has STARTED...' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); print ( 'future is STILL running' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); // throw Exception('BAL'); print ( 'future has FINISHED' ); return true ; }

      输出：

       future has STARTED... future is STILL running future has FINISHED stream.onData(): future finished with value: true stream.onDone(): done Exited

      结论：

      • 情况 2 - future正常完成，但stream已被取消
        void main ( List < String > args ) async { try { final stream = longAPICall () . asStream (); var sub = stream . listen ( ( v ) = > print ( ' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v ' ), onDone: () = > print ( ' stream.onDone(): done' ), onError: ( e ) = > print ( ' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()} ' ), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); await sub . cancel (); print ( ' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!' ); } catch ( e ) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print ( 'catched: ${e.toString()} ' ); } } Future < bool > longAPICall () async { print ( 'future has STARTED...' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); print ( 'future is STILL running' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); // throw Exception('HEHE'); print ( 'future has FINISHED' ); return true ; }

        输出：

         future has STARTED... stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled! future is STILL running future has FINISHED Exited

        结论：

        • 不调用onDone和onData回调（结果被完全忽略）

        情况 3 - 在stream被取消之前throws ， onError已定义且cancelOnError为false （默认）

         void main ( List < String > args ) async { try { final stream = longAPICall () . asStream (); var sub = stream . listen ( ( v ) = > print ( ' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v ' ), onDone: () = > print ( ' stream.onDone(): done' ), onError: ( e ) = > print ( ' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()} ' ), cancelOnError: false , // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch ( e ) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print ( 'catched: ${e.toString()} ' ); } } Future < bool > longAPICall () async { print ( 'future has STARTED...' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); print ( 'future is STILL running' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); throw Exception ( 'HEHE' ); print ( 'future has FINISHED' ); return true ; }

        输出：

         future has STARTED... future is STILL running stream.onError(): Exception: HEHE stream.onDone(): done Exited

        结论：

        • 情况 4 - 在stream被取消之前throws ， onError已定义， cancelOnError为true
           void main ( List < String > args ) async { try { final stream = longAPICall () . asStream (); var sub = stream . listen ( ( v ) = > print ( ' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v ' ), onDone: () = > print ( ' stream.onDone(): done' ), onError: ( e ) = > print ( ' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()} ' ), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens cancelOnError: true , // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch ( e ) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print ( 'catched: ${e.toString()} ' ); } } Future < bool > longAPICall () async { print ( 'future has STARTED...' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); print ( 'future is STILL running' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); throw Exception ( 'HEHE' ); print ( 'future has FINISHED' ); return true ; }

          输出：

           future has STARTED... future is STILL running stream.onError(): Exception: HEHE Exited

          结论：

          • 调用onError回调
          • 不调用onDone
          • 不调用try-catch

          情况 5 - 在取消stream之前throws ，未定义onError

           void main ( List < String > args ) async { try { final stream = longAPICall () . asStream (); var sub = stream . listen ( ( v ) = > print ( ' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v ' ), onDone: () = > print ( ' stream.onDone(): done' ), // onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch ( e ) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print ( 'catched: ${e.toString()} ' ); } } Future < bool > longAPICall () async { print ( 'future has STARTED...' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); print ( 'future is STILL running' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); throw Exception ( 'HEHE' ); print ( 'future has FINISHED' ); return true ; }

          输出：

           future has STARTED... future is STILL running stream.onDone(): done Unhandled exception: Exception: BAL #0 longAPICall bin/future_playground.dart:29 <asynchronous suspension> #1 new Stream.fromFuture.<anonymous closure> (dart:async/stream.dart:247:17) <asynchronous suspension> Exited (255)

          结论：

          • 异常被Zone's错误处理捕获

          情况 6 - stream被取消后的future throws

           void main ( List < String > args ) async { try { final stream = longAPICall () . asStream (); var sub = stream . listen ( ( v ) = > print ( ' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v ' ), onDone: () = > print ( ' stream.onDone(): done' ), // onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); await sub . cancel (); print ( ' stream was ALREADY cancelled!' ); } catch ( e ) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print ( 'catched: ${e.toString()} ' ); } } Future < bool > longAPICall () async { print ( 'future has STARTED...' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); print ( 'future is STILL running' ); await Future . delayed ( Duration ( seconds: 2 )); throw Exception ( 'HEHE' ); print ( 'future has FINISHED' ); return true ; }

          输出：

           future has STARTED... stream was ALREADY cancelled! future is STILL running Exited

          结论：

          • 即使我们取消了stream ， future也会继续运行
          • 一旦暂停，guilhermev 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，guilhermev 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发表，guilhermev 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 guilhermev 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 guilhermev 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 guilhermev 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Guilherme Silva

Posted on Oct 29

Dart makes it easy to transform a future into a stream, but what will happen after that? For example, if we cancel the stream, what will happen in the future? And what about if the future throws an exception? Can a try-catch block help?

TLDR

Into

Problem: In dart, you can't cancel (or stop) a future

Possible solution: you can cancel a stream's subscription. So, the idea is to transform a future into a stream, and cancel it when needed.

We need to understand what will happen:

  • in case it completes normally
    • before that, the stream is canceled
    • but the stream was already canceled
  • in case it throws
    • before the stream is canceled,
      • onError is defined
        • and cancelOnError is false (default)
        • and cancelOnError is true (default)
      • onError is NOT defined
    • after the stream is canceled

Situation 1 - the future completes normally, before that the stream is canceled 

void main(List<String> args) async { try { final stream = longAPICall().asStream(); var sub = stream.listen( (v) => print(' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v'), onDone: () => print(' stream.onDone(): done'), onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch (e) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print('catched: ${e.toString()}'); }
} Future<bool> longAPICall() async { print('future has STARTED...'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); print('future is STILL running'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); // throw Exception('BAL'); print('future has FINISHED'); return true;
}

output:

future has STARTED...
future is STILL running
future has FINISHED
  stream.onData(): future finished with value: true
  stream.onDone(): done
Exited

conclusions:

  • both onDone and onData callbacks are called
  • onData is called with the future's result

Situation 2 - the future completes normally, but the stream was already canceled 

void main(List<String> args) async { try { final stream = longAPICall().asStream(); var sub = stream.listen( (v) => print(' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v'), onDone: () => print(' stream.onDone(): done'), onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); await sub.cancel(); print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch (e) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print('catched: ${e.toString()}'); }
} Future<bool> longAPICall() async { print('future has STARTED...'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); print('future is STILL running'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); // throw Exception('HEHE'); print('future has FINISHED'); return true;
}

output:

future has STARTED...
   stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!
future is STILL running
future has FINISHED
Exited

conclusions:

  • the future continues running, even after we canceled the stream
  • both onDone and onData callbacks are NOT called (the result is completely ignored)

Situation 3 - throws before the stream is canceled, onError is defined and cancelOnError is false (default) 

void main(List<String> args) async { try { final stream = longAPICall().asStream(); var sub = stream.listen( (v) => print(' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v'), onDone: () => print(' stream.onDone(): done'), onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch (e) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print('catched: ${e.toString()}'); }
} Future<bool> longAPICall() async { print('future has STARTED...'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); print('future is STILL running'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); throw Exception('HEHE'); print('future has FINISHED'); return true;
}

output:

future has STARTED...
future is STILL running
  stream.onError(): Exception: HEHE
  stream.onDone(): done
Exited

conclusions:

  • both onDone and onError callbacks are called

Situation 4 - throws before the stream is canceled, onError is defined, cancelOnError is true 

void main(List<String> args) async { try { final stream = longAPICall().asStream(); var sub = stream.listen( (v) => print(' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v'), onDone: () => print(' stream.onDone(): done'), onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch (e) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print('catched: ${e.toString()}'); }
} Future<bool> longAPICall() async { print('future has STARTED...'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); print('future is STILL running'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); throw Exception('HEHE'); print('future has FINISHED'); return true;
}

output:

future has STARTED...
future is STILL running
  stream.onError(): Exception: HEHE
Exited

conclusions:

  • onError callbacks is called
  • onDone is NOT called
  • try-catch is NOT called

Situation 5 - throws before the stream is canceled, onError is NOT defined 

void main(List<String> args) async { try { final stream = longAPICall().asStream(); var sub = stream.listen( (v) => print(' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v'), onDone: () => print(' stream.onDone(): done'), // onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); // await sub.cancel(); // print(' stream.cancel() was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch (e) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print('catched: ${e.toString()}'); }
} Future<bool> longAPICall() async { print('future has STARTED...'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); print('future is STILL running'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); throw Exception('HEHE'); print('future has FINISHED'); return true;
}

output:

future has STARTED...
future is STILL running
  stream.onDone(): done
Unhandled exception:
Exception: BAL
#0      longAPICall
bin/future_playground.dart:29
<asynchronous suspension>
#1      new Stream.fromFuture.<anonymous closure> (dart:async/stream.dart:247:17)
<asynchronous suspension>

Exited (255)

conclusions:

  • both onDone is still called (because cancelOnError's default is false)
  • try-catch is ignored (aahá! 👀)
  • exception is caught by Zone's error handling

Situation 6 - the future throws after the stream is canceled 

void main(List<String> args) async { try { final stream = longAPICall().asStream(); var sub = stream.listen( (v) => print(' stream.onData(): future finished with value: $v'), onDone: () => print(' stream.onDone(): done'), // onError: (e) => print(' stream.onError(): ${e.toString()}'), // cancelOnError: false, // default - onDone() will be called even when errors happens // cancelOnError: true, // onDone() will NOT be called when errors happens ); await sub.cancel(); print(' stream was ALREADY cancelled!'); } catch (e) { // this never happens, even if we don't define onError() // in this case it'll handled by zones print('catched: ${e.toString()}'); }
} Future<bool> longAPICall() async { print('future has STARTED...'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); print('future is STILL running'); await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2)); throw Exception('HEHE'); print('future has FINISHED'); return true;
}

output:

future has STARTED...
   stream was ALREADY cancelled!
future is STILL running
Exited

conclusions:

  • the future continues running even after we canceled the stream
  • try-catch is ignored
  • onError was not declared, and it didn't make a difference (the error is simply ignored, and wasn't sent to zone 's handler) (aahá(2)! 👀)

Once suspended, guilhermev will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, guilhermev will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by guilhermev will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If guilhermev is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag guilhermev:

guilhermev consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging guilhermev will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: guilhermev

item.title: 如何远程利用 PHP 绕过过滤器和 WAF 规则 | How To Exploit PHP Remotely To Bypass Filters & WAF Rules
item.description:
这是我将用于所有测试的两个易受攻击的 PHP 脚本中的第一个。 这个脚本绝对是太简单太笨了，但它只是为了重现一个远程代码执行漏洞场景（可能在真实场景中，你会做更多的工作来达到这种情况）：

显然，第六行是纯粹的邪恶。 第三行尝试拦截诸如 system、exec 或 passthru 之类的函数（PHP 中有许多其他函数可以执行系统命令，但让我们关注这三个）。 该脚本在 Cloudflare WAF 后面的 Web 服务器中运行（与往常一样，我使用 Cloudflare 是因为它简单且广为人知，这并不意味着 Cloudflare WAF 不安全。所有其他 WAF 都有相同的问题， 或多或少…）。 第二个脚本将在 ModSecurity + OWASP CRS3 之后。

对于第一个测试，我尝试通过请求 /cfwaf.php?code=system(“cat /etc/passwd”); 使用 system() 函数读取 /etc/passwd；

如您所见，CloudFlare 阻止了我的请求（可能是因为“/etc/passwd”），但是，如果您阅读了我上一篇关于未初始化变量的文章，我可以使用 cat /etc$u/passwd 之类的内容轻松绕过它

有没有一种语法可以让我在不使用“system”字符串的情况下使用系统函数？ 让我们看一下关于字符串的 PHP 文档！

不是每个人都知道 PHP 有很多表示字符串的语法，并且通过“PHP 变量函数”，它成为我们绕过过滤器和规则的瑞士军刀。

这意味着如果一个变量名附加了括号，PHP 将寻找一个与该变量计算结果相同的名称的函数，并尝试执行它。 除其他外，这可用于实现回调、函数表等。

这意味着像 $var(args); 这样的语法和“字符串”（args）； 等于函数（args）；。 如果我可以通过使用变量或字符串来调用函数，这意味着我可以使用转义序列而不是函数的名称。 这里有一个例子：

第三种语法是十六进制字符的转义序列，PHP 将其转换为字符串“system”，然后转换为带有参数“ls”的函数系统。 让我们试试我们的易受攻击的脚本：

此技术不适用于所有 PHP 函数，变量函数不适用于 echo、print、unset()、isset()、empty()、include、require 等语言结构。 利用包装函数将这些结构中的任何一个用作变量函数。

改进用户输入清理

如果我从易受攻击的脚本的用户输入中排除双引号和单引号等字符会发生什么？ 即使不使用双引号也可以绕过它吗？ 我们试试看：

正如您在第三行看到的，现在脚本阻止在 $_GET[code] 查询字符串参数中使用“和”。 我以前的有效载荷现在应该被阻止：

幸运的是，在 PHP 中，我们并不总是需要引号来表示字符串。 在这种情况下，$a 包含字符串“foo”。 此外，圆括号内没有特定类型声明的任何内容都被视为字符串：

在这种情况下，我们有两种方法可以绕过新过滤器：第一种是使用类似 (system)(ls) 的方法； 但是我们不能在代码参数中使用“system”，所以我们可以连接字符串，如 (sy.(st).em)(ls);。 第二个是使用 $_GET 变量。 如果我发送类似 ?a=system&b=ls&code=$_GET a的请求； 结果是：$_GET[a] 将替换为字符串“system”，$_GET[b] 将替换为字符串“ls”，我将能够绕过所有过滤器！

让我们尝试第一个有效载荷 (sy.(st).em)(whoami);

和第二个有效载荷 ?a=system&b=cat+/etc&c=/passwd&code=$_GET a ；

在这种情况下，没有用，但您甚至可以在函数名称和参数中插入注释（这对于绕过阻止特定 PHP 函数名称的 WAF 规则集可能很有​​用）。 以下所有语法均有效：

此 PHP 函数返回一个多维数组，其中包含所有已定义函数的列表，包括内置（内部）和用户定义的。 内部函数可以通过 $arr[“internal”] 访问，用户定义的函数使用 $arr[“user”]。 例如：

这可能是另一种在不使用系统名称的情况下访问系统功能的方式。 如果我用 grep 搜索“系统”，我可以发现它的索引号并将其用作我的代码执行的字符串：

显然，这应该对我们的 Cloudflare WAF 和脚本过滤器起作用：

字符数组

这可能是另一种规避阻止 PHP 函数名称的规则的方法。 例如，使用此字符串 $a=”elmsty/ “; 我可以编写语法系统（“ls /tmp”）；

如果幸运的话，您可以在脚本文件名中找到您需要的所有字符。 使用相同的技术，您可以选择所需的所有字符，例如

让我说，有了 OWASP CRS3，一切都变得更难了。 首先，以我之前看到的技术，我只能绕过第一层偏执狂，这太神奇了！ 因为偏执狂 1 级只是我们在 CRS3 中可以找到的规则的一小部分，所以该级别旨在防止任何误报。 对于 2 级偏执狂，由于规则 942430“受限 SQL 字符异常检测 (args)：超出特殊字符数”，所有事情都变得困难。 我能做的只是执行一个不带“ls”、“whoami”等参数的命令。但我不能像使用 Cloudflare WAF 那样执行 system(“cat /etc/passwd”) 之类的东西：

技术解决方案 - 一旦暂停，tutorialboy 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，tutorialboy 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，tutorialboy 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 tutorialboy 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 tutorialboy 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记的 tutorialboy 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

This is the first of two vulnerable PHP scripts that I’m going to use for all tests. This script is definitely too easy and dumb but it’s just to reproducing a remote code execution vulnerability scenario (probably in a real scenario, you’ll do a little bit more work to reach this situation):

Obviously, the sixth line is pure evil. The third line tries to intercept functions like system, exec or passthru (there’re many other functions in PHP that can execute system commands but let’s focus on these three). This script is running in a web server behind the Cloudflare WAF (as always, I’m using Cloudflare because it’s easy and widely known by the people, this doesn’t mean that Cloudflare WAF is not secure. All other WAF have the same issues, more or less…). The second script will be behind ModSecurity + OWASP CRS3.

For the first test, I try to read /etc/passwd using system() function by the request /cfwaf.php?code=system(“cat /etc/passwd”);

As you can see, CloudFlare blocks my request (maybe because of the “/etc/passwd”) but, if you have read my last article about uninitialized variables, I can easily bypass it with something like cat /etc$u/passwd

Cloudflare WAF has been bypassed but the check on the user’s input blocked my request because I’m trying to use the “system” function. Is there a syntax that let me use the system function without using the “system” string? Let’s take a look at the PHP documentation about strings!

PHP String escape sequences

  • [0–7]{1,3} sequence of characters in octal notation, which silently overflows to fit in a byte (e.g. “\400” === “\000”)

  • \x[0–9A-Fa-f]{1,2} sequence of characters in hexadecimal notation (e.g. “\x41")

  • \u{[0–9A-Fa-f]+} sequence of Unicode codepoint, which will be output to the string as that codepoint’s UTF-8 representation (added in PHP 7.0.0)
    Not everyone knows that PHP has a lot of syntaxes for representing a string, and with the “PHP Variable functions” it becomes our Swiss Army knife for bypassing filters and rules.

PHP Variable Functions

PHP supports the concept of variable functions. This means that if a variable name has parentheses appended to it, PHP will look for a function with the same name as whatever the variable evaluates to, and will attempt to execute it. Among other things, this can be used to implement callbacks, function tables, and so forth.

this means that syntaxes like $var(args); and “string”(args); are equal to function(args);. If I can call a function by using a variable or a string, it means that I can use an escape sequence instead of the name of a function. Here an example:

the third syntax is an escape sequence of characters in a hexadecimal notation that PHP converts to the string “system” and then it converts to the function system with the argument “ls”. Let’s try with our vulnerable script:

This technique doesn’t work for all PHP functions, variable functions won’t work with language constructs such as echo, print, unset(), isset(), empty(), include, require and the like. Utilize wrapper functions to make use of any of these constructs as variable functions.

Improve the user input sanitization

What happens if I exclude characters like double and single quotes from the user input on the vulnerable script? Is it possible to bypass it even without using double quotes? Let’s try:

as you can see on the third line, now the script prevents the use of “ and ‘ inside the $_GET[code] query string parameter. My previous payload should be blocked now:

Luckily, in PHP, we don’t always need quotes to represent a string. PHP makes you able to declare the type of an element, something like $a = (string)foo; in this case, $a contains the string “foo”. Moreover, whatever is inside round brackets without a specific type declaration, is treated as a string:

In this case, we’ve two ways to bypass the new filter: the first one is to use something like (system)(ls); but we can’t use “system” inside the code parameter, so we can concatenate strings like (sy.(st).em)(ls);. The second one is to use the $_GET variable. If I send a request like ?a=system&b=ls&code=$_GETa; the result is: $_GET[a] will be replaced with the string “system” and $_GET[b] will be replaced with the string “ls” and I’ll able to bypass all filters!

Let’s try with the first payload (sy.(st).em)(whoami);

and the second payload ?a=system&b=cat+/etc&c=/passwd&code=$_GETa;

In this case, is not useful, but you can even insert comments inside the function name and inside the arguments (this could be useful in order to bypass WAF Rule Set that blocks specific PHP function names). All following syntaxes are valid:

get_defined_functions

This PHP function returns a multidimensional array containing a list of all defined functions, both built-in (internal) and user-defined. The internal functions will be accessible via $arr[“internal”], and the user-defined ones using $arr[“user”]. For example:

This could be another way to reach the system function without using its name. If I grep for “system” I can discover its index number and use it as a string for my code execution:

obviously, this should work against our Cloudflare WAF and script filters:

Array of characters

Each string in PHP can be used as an array of characters (almost like Python does) and you can refer to a single string character with the syntax $string[2] or $string[-3]. This could be another way to elude rules that block PHP functions names. For example, with this string $a=”elmsty/ “; I can compose the syntax system(“ls /tmp”);

If you’re lucky you can find all the characters you need inside the script filename. With the same technique, you can pick all chars you need with something like

OWASP CRS3
Let me say that with the OWASP CRS3 all become harder. First, with the techniques seen before I can bypass only the first paranoia level, and this is amazing! Because Paranoia Level 1 is just a little subset of rules of what we can find in the CRS3, this level is designed to prevent any false positives. With a Paranoia Level 2 all things become hard because of the rule 942430 “Restricted SQL Character Anomaly Detection (args): # of special characters exceeded”. What I can do is just execute a single command without arguments like “ls”, “whoami”, etc.. but I can’t execute something like system(“cat /etc/passwd”) as done with Cloudflare WAF:

Techsolutionstuff - Jul 15

item.title: Hacktoberfest PR#4：回归本源 | Hacktoberfest PR#4: back to the roots
item.description:
阿尔乔姆·塔尼欣

发表于嘿！ 谢谢你的光临。 本周，我为今年的 Hacktoberfest 进行了最后一次 PR，所以让我告诉你它是如何进行的。

问题

本周，我决定从事一个名为Alice Game的初学者项目。

我想从大型项目的持续活动中休息一下，并有一些创造力的空间，所以我选择了一个对我来说听起来很有趣的问题。 这还涉及到普通 HTML/CSS 的工作，这帮助我保持前端技能的形状。

处理这个问题

由于本周的回购刚刚开始，谢天谢地，设置它没有任何困难。 我分叉了回购并开始研究它。

使用纯 HTML/CSS 而不是我通常处理的那些复杂的前端框架非常令人耳目一新。 有时尝试从头开始创建东西很有趣，我非常喜欢处理这个问题！

完成后，我提交了一个快速拉取请求并等待对我的工作的反馈。

概括

虽然这项活动没有那么令人印象深刻，但我认为帮助小型项目成长并从嘈杂的大型项目中休息一下非常重要。 另外，这样的回购有一定的魅力，非常吸引人。

原文:

Artem Tanyhin

Posted on Oct 29

Hey there! Thanks for coming by. This week, I worked on my last PR for this year Hacktoberfest, so let me tell you about how it went.

The issue

This week, I decided to work on a beginner project called Alice Game.

I wanted to rest from the constant activity on bigger projects and have some space for creativity, so I picked an issue that sounded fun to me. This also involved working on vanilla HTML/CSS, which helped me keep my front-end skills in shape.

Working on the issue

Since this week's repo was in its beginning, thankfully there was no struggle with setting it up. I forked the repo and started working on it.

It is very refreshing working on plain HTML/CSS instead of those complex front-end frameworks that I usually deal with. Sometimes it is just fun trying to create things from scratch, and I enjoyed working on the issue very much!

After I was done, I submitted a quick pull request and waited for feedback on my work.

Summary

Although this activity wasn't as impressive, I believe it is very important to help small projects grow, and take a break from big noisy projects. Plus, there is a certain charm to such repos which is very appealing.

item.title: 使用 SQL Alchemy 和 MindsDB 预测钻石价格 | Predict Diamond prices with SQL Alchemy and MindsDB
item.description:
在本教程中，我们将学习如何使用名为 SQLAlchemy 的 Python 库创建、训练和查询机器学习模型。 它是提供使用面向对象编程与数据库交互的接口的 ORM 库之一。 在本教程中，我们将使用 Kaggle 数据集diamond.csv来预测钻石的价格。

先决条件

以下是本教程的要求：

  • 您选择的任何 IDE 最好是 VS 代码。

连接我们的数据库

首先，我们需要将我们的数据集上传到 MindsDB 云接口按照本指南学习如何上传到这里的接口，然后你可以在这里下载diamonds.csv上的 diamonds.csv 数据集

现在，导航到工作目录，然后创建一个main.py文件。 要创建数据库连接，只需按照本指南了解如何使用 Sqlachemy 和 pymysql 进行操作。

当你完成后，你应该有这样的东西：

 from sqlalchemy import create_engine user = "teslimodumuyiwa@gmail.com" password = "MindsDB Cloud Password" host = "cloud.mindsdb.com" port = 3306 database = "" def establish_connection (): engine = create_engine ( url = f "mysql+pymysql:// { user } : { password } @ { host } : { port } / { database } " ) return engine try : engine = establish_connection () engine . connect () print ( "Connection to the database is established" ) except Exception as e : print ( "Couldn't connect to the database: \n " , e )

您还可以通过使用python main.py从终端运行 python 文件来检查您的连接是否成功

要对您的连接进行进一步检查，您可能需要对数据库运行查询以查看它是否返回一些数据。

 from sqlalchemy import create_engine user = "teslimodumuyiwa@gmail.com" password = "Your MindsDB Cloud Password" host = "cloud.mindsdb.com" port = 3306 database = "" def establish_connection (): engine = create_engine ( url = f "mysql+pymysql:// { user } : { password } @ { host } : { port } / { database } " ) return engine try : engine = establish_connection () with engine . connect () as eng : query = eng . execute ( "SELECT * FROM files.diamonds LIMIT 5;" ) for row in query : print ( row ) except Exception as e : print ( "Couldn't connect to the database: \n " , e )

预期输出为：

使用CREATE PREDICTOR训练预测器

完成后，我们现在可以训练我们的机器学习预测器。 为此，我们将使用CREATE PREDICTOR语法，在该语法中我们将指定我们将训练的FROM和PREDICT的内容。

通过执行以下代码来预测我们的钻石价格：

 from sqlalchemy import create_engine user = "teslimodumuyiwa@gmail.com" password = "Your MindsDB Cloud Password" host = "cloud.mindsdb.com" port = 3306 database = "" def establish_connection (): engine = create_engine ( url = f "mysql+pymysql:// { user } : { password } @ { host } : { port } / { database } " ) return engine try : engine = establish_connection () with engine . connect () as eng : query = eng . execute ( "CREATE PREDICTOR mindsdb.diamond_price FROM files (SELECT * FROM diamonds) PREDICT price;" ) except Exception as e : print ( "Couldn't connect to the database: \n " , e )

检查我们的预测器的状态

我们可以使用以下语法检查模型的状态。 如果查询返回 Complete，则模型已准备好使用，否则如果返回 Training，则等待。

 query = eng . execute ( "SELECT status FROM mindsdb.predictors WHERE name='diamond_price';" ) for i in query : print ( i )

如果培训未完成，您应该在终端中打印此内容：

如果培训完成，您应该在终端中打印：

做出预测

现在我们有了预测模型，我们可以简单地执行一些简单的 SQL 查询语句来根据特征参数预测目标值。

做出单一预测

您可以通过查询预测器来进行预测，就像它是一个表一样。 预期输出应该是：

使用JOIN进行批量预测

现在让我们通过将我们的表格与我们的模型连接起来，进行批量预测或多次预测来预测price 。

 bulk = text ( "SELECT t.price AS real_price, m.price_explain AS explained_price, t.carat, t.cut, t.color, t.depth, t.table FROM files.diamonds AS t JOIN mindsdb.diamond_price AS m LIMIT 10;" ) query = eng . execute ( bulk ) for i in query : print ( i )

在执行时，您应该将其打印到您的终端中

下一步是什么？

自己尝试的时候玩得开心！

如果本教程对您有帮助，请点赞或评论



原文:

In this tutorial, we will learn how to create, train and query a machine-learning model using a Python library called SQLAlchemy. SQLAlchemy is the most popular open-source library for working with relational databases from Python. It is one of the ORM libraries that provides an interface for using object-oriented programming to interact with a database. MindsDB is an open-source machine learning tool that brings predictive capabilities to your database. For this tutorial, we will be making use of the Kaggle dataset diamond.csv to predict the price of the diamonds.

Prerequisite

The following are the requirements for this tutorial:

  • Python
  • SQLAlchemy
  • MindsDB install via pip
  • pymysql
  • Any IDE of your choice preferably VS code.

Connecting our Database

Firstly, we need to upload our dataset into the MindsDB Cloud Interface follow this guide to learn how to upload to the interface here, and then you can download the diamonds.csv dataset on kaggle here

Now, navigate into a working directory , then create a main.py file. To create a database connection, simply follow this guide on how to do that using Sqlachemy and pymysql.

When you are done, you should have something like this:

from sqlalchemy import create_engine user = "teslimodumuyiwa@gmail.com"
password = "MindsDB Cloud Password"
host = "cloud.mindsdb.com"
port = 3306
database = "" def establish_connection(): engine = create_engine(url=f"mysql+pymysql://{user}:{password}@{host}:{port}/{database}") return engine
try: engine = establish_connection() engine.connect() print("Connection to the database is established")
except Exception as e: print("Couldn't connect to the database:\n",e)

You can also check that your connection is successful by running the python file from your terminal using python main.py

To run further checks on your connection, you might want to run queries on the database to see if it returns some data.

from sqlalchemy import create_engine user = "teslimodumuyiwa@gmail.com"
password = "Your MindsDB Cloud Password"
host = "cloud.mindsdb.com"
port = 3306
database = "" def establish_connection(): engine = create_engine(url=f"mysql+pymysql://{user}:{password}@{host}:{port}/{database}") return engine
try: engine = establish_connection() with engine.connect() as eng: query = eng.execute("SELECT * FROM files.diamonds LIMIT 5;") for row in query: print(row)
except Exception as e: print("Couldn't connect to the database:\n",e)

Expected output would be:

Training a Predictor With CREATE PREDICTOR

With that done, we can now train our machine-learning predictor. For that, we are going to use the CREATE PREDICTOR syntax where we would specify what query we will train FROM and what to PREDICT.

By implementing the following code to predict the price of our diamond:

from sqlalchemy import create_engine user = "teslimodumuyiwa@gmail.com"
password = "Your MindsDB Cloud Password"
host = "cloud.mindsdb.com"
port = 3306
database = "" def establish_connection(): engine = create_engine(url=f"mysql+pymysql://{user}:{password}@{host}:{port}/{database}") return engine
try: engine = establish_connection() with engine.connect() as eng: query = eng.execute("CREATE PREDICTOR mindsdb.diamond_price FROM files (SELECT * FROM diamonds) PREDICT price;") except Exception as e: print("Couldn't connect to the database:\n",e)

Checking the Status of our Predictor

We can check the status of the model with the syntax below. If the query returns Complete, then the model is ready to be used, or else wait if it returns Training.

query = eng.execute("SELECT status FROM mindsdb.predictors WHERE name='diamond_price';") for i in query: print(i)

If the training is not complete, you should get this printed in your terminal:

If the training is complete, you should get this printed in your terminal:

Making Predictions

Now that we have our Prediction Model, we can simply execute some simple SQL query statements to predict the target value based on the feature parameters.

Making a Single Prediction

You can make predictions by querying the predictor as if it were a table. The [SELECT](https://docs.mindsdb.com/sql/api/select/) statement lets you make predictions for the diamonds on the chosen feature parameter.

// main.py
query = eng.execute("SELECT price, price_explain FROM mindsdb.diamond_price WHERE carat = 0.23 AND depth = 56.9;") for i in query: print(i)

Expected output should be:

Make Batch Predictions with JOIN

Now let’s make bulk predictions or multiple predictions to predict the price by joining our table with our model.

bulk = text("SELECT t.price AS real_price, m.price_explain AS explained_price, t.carat, t.cut, t.color, t.depth, t.table FROM files.diamonds AS t JOIN mindsdb.diamond_price AS m LIMIT 10;") query = eng.execute(bulk) for i in query: print(i)

On execution, you should get this printed into your terminal

What’s Next?

Have fun while trying it out yourself!

Give a like or a comment if this tutorial was helpful
item.author: tesprogram
